message:
feat(ledger): implement evidence glyph mapping for all feature types

Replace placeholder get_glyph() and default_glyph_map() with real
Unicode glyph mappings for all evidence features (cpu, runtime, orphan,
tty, net, io_active, state_flag, command_category, signature_match,
fast_path, prior). Populate evidence_glyphs in
EvidenceLedger::from_posterior_result() from computed Bayes factors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
